seo_title: Cozy Cactus | Family-Friendly Vacation Rental in Indio with Pool
seo_description: Family vacation rental in Indio with pool, hot tub, full infant gear kit, and a labeled-everything kitchen. 3BR, sleeps 8. Book direct, save 15%.
tagline: Where parents finally rest on vacation.
description_heading: The rental families keep coming back to.
description_p1: "It's the first time we have truly rested during our vacation with our 3 children." That's a real review, and the same sentiment shows up in different words across 146 stays.
description_p2: Pack-n-play already set up. Sound machines in every bedroom. Stokke high chair. A labeled drawer system so nothing goes missing at 6am when someone is hungry and everyone is tired. The organization system guests mention in almost every review is exactly what it sounds like: every drawer labeled, every item where you would expect it.
description_p3: Three bedrooms, two bathrooms, sleeps up to eight. Playful energy throughout: turquoise, coral, warm color. A full kitchen that makes meal prep manageable. Private hot tub for after the kids are down. Community pool right across the street for afternoons when you need more space to run. Coffee bar stocked and ready early, because toddlers do not believe in sleeping in.
description_p4: Bunk beds in the kids room. A toy collection with real range: board games, art supplies, books, outdoor gear. The little details that make you say we should just stay another night. Kids ask when you are coming back before you have loaded the car.
